case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. KELLY CLARK ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, KELLY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 33 8TH STREET, #0718 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70127266)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER TO POST & MAIL; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70025108), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED MAY-09-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70127245) AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, KELLY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, KELLY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER TO POST & MAIL; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70025108), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED MAY-09-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, KELLY
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 70127245) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $99.96 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, KELLY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 69929323) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
